Quotas.QuotaName: On-demand model inference requests per minute for Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6
On-demand model inference tokens per minute for Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6

_meta.note: Account-wide quotas. RPM = 1,000 and TPM = 4,000,000 for claude-sonnet-4-6 in us-east-1. No cross-region inference profiles are configured. No provisioned throughput is purchased. The platform routes all 87 tenants through this single quota.
